title: eryngium castrense
intro: Eryngium castrense, also known as Castile thistle or Spanish thistle, is a perennial flowering plant in the carrot family, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. Some of the health benefits associated with Eryngium castrense include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and act as a natural diuretic. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
